title: HIGH COUNTRY HEALTH AND WELLNESS CENTER PRIMARY CARE - 211info
text: HARNEY COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH HIGH COUNTRY HEALTH AND WELLNESS CENTER PRIMARY CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Family practice providing primary care services including CDL's, physicals, immunizations, and acute care. 420 N Fairview Avenue Burns, OR 97720 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-noon and 1pm-5pm (541) 573-2271 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 573-2271 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts OHP and some private insurances. Offers sliding scale fees for uninsured individuals. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Proof of income if applying for sliding scale fees. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, other interpretation by an online/phone translation service. AREA SERVED: Harney County SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on North Fairview directly across the street from Harney District Hospital Services: Childhood Immunization General Medical Care Pediatrics Public Clinics Vaccine Information Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - SCREENWISE-ENROLLING HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - WOMEN, INFANTS, AND CHILDREN SUPPLEMENTAL NUTRITION PROGRAM PUBLIC HEALTH - COMMUNICABLE DISEASE PROGRAM SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - TUBERCULOSIS PROGRAM SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - VACCINES AND IMMUNIZATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HARNEY COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH
